name: Dynamic Resolution via Domain Generation Algorithm
description: Detects domain generation algorithm patterns in DNS queries
query:
// Detect DGA domains in DNS traffic
// Trigger on high volume of NXDomain responses to random-looking domains
events from dns
where response_code = "NXDOMAIN"
  and query_name matches "^[a-z0-9]{8,20}\.(com|net|org|info|biz|xyz|top)$"
group by source_ip
having count(*) > 20
within 300 seconds
